SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class LifeOfFieldOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.LifeOfFieldOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LifeOfFieldOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Multi-period (life-of-field) optimizer that schedules capital investments in time.

Single-period optimization tunes setpoints for one operating point; field development decisions are intrinsically multi-period — when to install compression, drill an infill well, or debottleneck a flowline changes the discounted value of the whole field. This optimizer searches over the installation year of each candidate investment (including the option never to make it) to maximise the discounted net present value of the field over its life.

The per-period economics are supplied by a LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator: given a year and the set of investments active in that year, it returns the net annual cash flow (typically obtained by configuring the corresponding NeqSim flowsheet, advancing the reservoir with SimpleReservoir.runTransient, running it to convergence, and pricing the result with ValueChainObjective). Keeping the evaluator functional makes the search deterministic and unit-testable without running a flowsheet.

The investment timeline is found by bounded enumeration: each investment may be installed in any year from its earliest feasible year to the end of field life, or skipped entirely. A guard caps the number of evaluated combinations so the search stays tractable for a handful of strategic decisions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    Description
    static class 
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.Investment
    A candidate capital investment that may be installed in a chosen year.
    static interface 
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator
    Functional evaluator returning the net annual cash flow for one period.
    static class 
    LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldResult
    Result of a life-of-field optimization.

  • Constructor Details

    • LifeOfFieldOptimizer

      public LifeOfFieldOptimizer(int nYears, EconomicParameters econ)
      Creates a life-of-field optimizer.
      Parameters:
      nYears - number of production years (year indices 0..nYears-1); must be positive
      econ - the economic parameters supplying the discount rate (must not be null)

  • Method Details

    • addInvestment

      public LifeOfFieldOptimizer addInvestment(LifeOfFieldOptimizer.Investment investment)
      Registers a candidate investment.
      Parameters:
      investment - the investment to add (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • setMaxCombinations

      public LifeOfFieldOptimizer setMaxCombinations(long maxCombinations)
      Sets the cap on the number of investment-timing combinations evaluated.
      Parameters:
      maxCombinations - the maximum number of combinations (must be positive)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • optimize

      public LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldResult optimize(LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator evaluator)
      Optimizes the investment timeline to maximise discounted net present value.
      Parameters:
      evaluator - the per-period economic evaluator (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the optimal timeline and its net present value

    • enumerate

      private void enumerate(int index, int[] current, int[] best, double[] bestNpv, double[] bestCashFlow, LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator evaluator)
      Recursively enumerates investment-timing combinations and retains the best by net present value.
      Parameters:
      index - the investment index currently being assigned
      current - the working install-year assignment
      best - the best install-year assignment found so far (updated in place)
      bestNpv - a single-element array holding the best net present value found so far
      bestCashFlow - the cash-flow schedule of the best timeline (updated in place)
      evaluator - the per-period economic evaluator

    • computeNpv

      private double computeNpv(int[] installYears, double[] cashFlowOut, LifeOfFieldOptimizer.LifeOfFieldEvaluator evaluator)
      Computes the net present value of a fully assigned investment timeline.
      Parameters:
      installYears - install year per investment (-1 = skipped)
      cashFlowOut - output array receiving the net annual cash flow per year
      evaluator - the per-period economic evaluator
      Returns:
      the discounted net present value of the timeline
